servinfo.title: Seat Belt Pretensioner Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Seat Belt Pretensioner Removal and Installation

servinfo.ptxt: Refer to Front Seat Belt Assembly Removal and Installation .

item.ptxt: Never measure resistance of retractor pretensioner. Current of tester can activate pretensioner.
Do not face discharge hole (1) side downward or place anything on it when placing seat belt pretensioner which has not been activated.
Never repair or disassemble seat belt assembly.

servinfo.ptxt: Check seat belt assembly (retractor pretensioner) and if any of the following conditions is found, replace seat belt assembly (retractor pretensioner) with new one.

attention3.ptxt: As retractor pretensioner is controlled with driver and passenger air bag, you should judge that pretensioner has been activated if air bag has deployed.

item.ptxt: Deformation or damage of retractor pretensioner.
